I'm still having some trouble deciding which chaos char to go for on the targeted banner

Tawil wod sounds the best, but the chat looks tough to play at low enlightens.
Mauchette and Kathi both sound like good options to go for, Kathi seems to need e3, but seems like they fill more roles in team, so maybe they're better if the rest of the team isn't too invested? E3 would take a while but sounds achievable with a bit of luck/monthly dupes
ngl kath feels awful to play pre-E3
mouchette is actually usuable at e0 and her key enlighten is E2

Out of those three I think mouchette would probably make the most sense. The targeted banner also includes their wods and kath wod is ok...but not really on kath. Its more of a niche strength support wod.

Mouchette also has the plus of beingplayable at e2 in the endgame (though you do quite like the damage increase from e3). Kath really needs her e3 to function at all, though once you get it she is very strong.

Hum, yeah maybe she's just a support char for me for the forseeable future.

Dunno about tawil vs mau though
Does anyone other than tawil use tawils wod?
If your comparing overall performance in the endgame at e3, mouchette/kath >>>> tawil.
Really? Damn powercreep
you can always find room for a tawil wod if you don't already have a handsize wheel but dang it's hard to recommend going for a wheel rather than an awakener
Uh yeah. You can kind of throw tawils wod on a team just for the handsize and keyflare. Its one of the better handsize wheels tbh.
and there are other handsize wheels

But people kind of overrate the handsize wheels a little. Most of the time unless you are playing an awakener that actually _has_ a handsize wheel (castor/gmurphy/tawil/thais) you usually don't actually _need_ the handsize. There are a few teams where it is quite nice though.
We can never have 2 of the sane wheels right? They get instantly merged and if one of maxed we don't get more of it?
Yes, that is correct. If you get a wheel to + 12 the game gives you a little character level uncap resources but nothing else.
Sad
Eh, its a fair balance consideration from them. It lets them have things that are super broken like thais wheel and still have design space to do other things instead of powercreeping that monster.
That makes sense
But if they're willing to balance the game, why not just nerf it/buff other wods?
cant be powercreep tawil is supposed to be a support anyway 🤫
shes pretty aight as support the budget horla anger is nice to give a bit more oomph
